name: idiolect
description: Voice-true human writing for Claude Code — 60 built-in voice profiles, a deterministic AI-tell scanner, and a closed verify-revise loop.

plugins.name: idiolect
plugins.description: A roster of 60 fully-specified human voice profiles plus a deterministic AI-tell scanner. Write, humanize, audit, and mass-produce social posts that read as distinct, genuine people — verified by stylometry, not vibes.
